mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong job market growth (PAYEMS) indicates robust corporate earnings potential, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods with PAYEMS growth > 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 3% (CPIAUCSL) signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals strong supply-side momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for the INDPRO-GDPC1 interaction in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) during a demand-side expansion indicates elevated corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of periods with RSAFS growth > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts (HOUST) and declines in unemployment (UNRATE) signal a robust economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for HOUST-UNRATE interaction falls below 0.03 in any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5% signals aggressive monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of periods with FEDFUNDS > 5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) indicates elevated corporate output capacity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of periods with INDPRO growth > 1%.
